Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Terminus Mundi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Terminus Mundi is a spell from a language spoken in the age of Horizon's creation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Terminus Mundi projects darkness that overlaps the real world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — Terminus Mundi is an isolated world that can wear down combatants over time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — Horizon claims the Captain has been inducted into the magic of Terminus Mundi.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — Terminus Mundi is a spell that creates a pseudo-world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Terminus Mundi is a form of memory manifestation magic.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Terminus Mundi contains more than one pair of Aethril eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Terminus Mundi can manifest hands and eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Terminus Mundi can manifest an eye that casts visual illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Terminus Mundi can manifest hands that induce paralysis on touch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Terminus Mundi cracked and crumbled.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
